cableSetup: Plug Ground Clamp Cable into Negative (-) Socket.
Plug Wire Feed Power Cable into Positive (+) Socket.
Twist cables clockwise all the way to lock in place.
Determine which type of shielding gas would be appropriate for the welding you will do.
Attach the Gas Hose (included) to the Regulator's outlet and the Welder's gas inlet. Wrench-tighten both connections.
notes: Step 17 – DCEP Direct Current Electrode Positive Wire Setup for Solid Core (gas shielded) welding. Wire Feed Power Cable in Positive Socket; Ground Clamp Cable in Negative Socket.

cableSetup: Plug Ground Clamp Cable into Positive (+) Socket.
Plug Wire Feed Power Cable into Negative (-) Socket.
Twist cables clockwise all the way to lock in place.
notes: Step 16 – DCEN Direct Current Electrode Negative Wire Setup for Flux-Cored (gasless) welding. Wire Feed Power Cable in Negative Socket; Ground Clamp Cable in Positive Socket.

cableSetup: Plug cables in according to screen (TIG torch to negative terminal, ground clamp to positive terminal).
Connect gas according to screen (100% Argon).
Set SCFH between 10-25.
Connect gas line to gas regulator.
Connect foot pedal inside welder.
Leave wire feed power disconnected.
notes: TIG Welding section step 9a – polarity screen shows TIG torch on negative (−) terminal, ground clamp on positive (+) terminal, 100% Argon gas.

cableSetup: Plug cables in according to screen (electrode holder to positive terminal, ground clamp to negative terminal).
No gas required.
notes: Stick Welding section step 7a – polarity screen shows electrode holder on positive (+) terminal, ground clamp on negative (−) terminal, No Gas Required.

cableSetup: Connect ground clamp to negative terminal.
Connect wire feed power to positive terminal.
Connect MIG gun to wire feed.
Connect wire feed control inside welder.
notes: Quick Start Guide – MIG CABLE SETUP.

cableSetup: Follow MIG cable setup but connect ground clamp to positive terminal and wire feed power to negative terminal.
Connect MIG gun to wire feed.
Connect wire feed control inside welder.
notes: Quick Start Guide – FLUX CABLE SETUP: Follow MIG cable setup but swap polarity.

cableSetup: Connect ground clamp to positive terminal.
Connect TIG torch to negative terminal.
Connect gas line to gas regulator.
Connect foot pedal inside welder.
Leave wire feed power disconnected.
notes: Quick Start Guide – TIG CABLE SETUP.

cableSetup: Connect ground clamp to negative terminal.
Connect electrode holder to positive terminal.
Leave wire feed power disconnected.
notes: Quick Start Guide – STICK CABLE SETUP.
